---
title: Data
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
source("functions.R")

data = readxl::read_xlsx(here::here("whiteboardpollresults.xlsx")) %>%
  filter(status == "complete") %>%
  mutate(
    across(everything(), ~ replace_na(.x, 0)), 
    votes = hq_votes + rtp_votes) %>%
  group_by(series_no, series, date, question) %>%
  mutate(
    N = sum(votes), 
    share = round( (votes/N) * 100, 2)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

## Data Explorer

```{r}
data %>%
  select(-c(series_no, status)) %>%
  mutate(share = paste0(round(share,1),"%")) %>%
  datatable(rownames = FALSE,
            colnames = c("Series", "Date", "Question", "Option", "HQ Votes", "RTP Votes", "Total Votes", "N", "Share")) %>%
  formatDate(columns = "date", method = "toLocaleDateString")
```
